title: Light editorial neighborhood cafe
thesis: A refined local institution expressed through generous editorial type, quiet paper texture, and sunlit environmental photography.

visualContract.typography: High-contrast display serif paired with a plain humanist sans serif.
visualContract.composition: Near-even split hero; text occupies roughly 48 percent and photography 52 percent; featured products cross the fold.
visualContract.media: One atmospheric cafe photograph plus three tightly cropped drink photographs. The stepped arch mask becomes a repeatable brand motif.
visualContract.texture: Subtle paper grain and thin rules; almost no conventional cards or drop shadows.

responsiveIntent: Stack copy before the hero photograph, preserve a dramatic crop, and make the drink rail horizontally scrollable or a compact vertical list.
